assertionResults.reason: At 375px mobile viewport, basketball event cards render as rounded elevated containers with a dark-to-orange gradient background, 12px border radius, visible shadow, and orange-accent border. The basketball cards are visually distinct from football cards, which use a lighter flag-focused match layout without the same dark gradient card treatment. Screenshots confirm the polished container, shadow/elevation, differentiated background treatment, and contrast versus football cards.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; console showed only React DevTools info plus Next.js smooth-scroll and Fast Refresh development warnings
evidence.network: No tracked requests captured by agent-browser network requests during this validation

observations: Basketball card anchor elements use classes including bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-orange-900 rounded-xl shadow-elevated border-2 border-orange-500/30.
Computed styles on basketball cards showed 12px border radius and box shadows up to rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16) 0px 8px 32px 0px.
Basketball page had no horizontal overflow at 375px (scrollWidth 375, clientWidth 375).
Football reference cards did not present the same dark gradient/orange-accent card treatment, making basketball cards visually distinct.

summary: Validated 1 assertion (VAL-VIS-006): passed. Basketball cards have a distinctive polished design and are visually differentiated from football cards at 375px.
